usage: staggerBondPad [-help] [-pad <position padName position padName...>] [-pinName <pinName>] {-pattern <pattern_string> | -startStaggerPosition {I M O}} {{-startIoInstName <instName> [-endIoInstName <instName>]} | {[-side {e w n s}] [-ring <number>]} | -all }

options.name: -all
options.description: specifies that bond pads will be placed on all I/O instances

options.name: -endIoInstName
options.description: specifies the name of the last I/O instance

options.name: -pad
options.description: <position padName position padName...> specifies which bond pad and position to use

options.name: -pattern
options.description: specifies the stagger pattern of the bond pads

options.name: -pinName
options.description: specifies the name of the pin inside the instance

options.name: -ring
options.description: specifies which ring to operate on

options.name: -side
options.description: specifies the geographical side of the die

options.name: -startIoInstName
options.description: specifies the name of the first I/O instance

options.name: -startStaggerPosition
options.description: specifies the starting stagger position of the specified bond pad
